I love my cloche butterflies! Thank-you" See more ...

Best customer service in Savannah and the surrounding area. From custom orders with designers available to help to a great showroom to buy and deliver within the same week.

leads.name: Savannah, GA Furniture Store | Ethan Allen
leads.snippet: Savannah, GA About Our Design Center Shop Ethan Allen's furniture store today in Savannah, GA, at 5525 Abercorn St., Savannah, GA 31405 just 10 minutes from Savannah's historic downtown. We offer a broad range of furniture and accessories, including quality living room furniture, dining room furniture, bedroom furniture and home décor.
